frame · Frame · A way of seeing — rules of projection over data that never changes; every viewer is one, and is a node in the space it views. · domain: language · kind: concept · tags: view, lens, perspective, coordinate, reader
block · Block · The atomic composable unit — typed, addressed, nestable; every boundary the root of its own cascade. · domain: language · kind: object · tags: unit, composable, atom, nest, boundary
equation · Equation · A law that computes — a value derived from relations, never placed by hand. · reads as: law · domain: language · kind: concept · tags: law, derive, rule, calculate, invariant
window · Window · The visible half of the world — the coordinate space made touchable: see, point, direct. · domain: language · kind: object · tags: see, point, direct, world-map, interface

seed · Seed · The start that carries the whole — every telling grows root-first from it, complete at every stage. · reads as: beginning · domain: language · kind: object · tags: root, start, grow, origin, generation

weave · Weave · Descent and traverse woven — the multiaxial reading; any forward walk through the lattice is a valid telling. · domain: language · kind: concept · tags: warp, weft, descend, traverse, lattice, walk
judge · Judge · The one that weighs — extraction proposes in parallel, judgment composes the one answer. · domain: language · kind: action · tags: decide, weigh, verify, compose, abstain

ring · Ring · The boundary that carries identity through change — interior change is state, boundary change is becoming. · domain: language · kind: concept · tags: boundary, identity, becoming, anchor, continuity

corpus · Corpus · The remembered whole — everything spoken, kept addressed; the transcripts are the root of all data. · reads as: memory · domain: language · kind: object · tags: memory, store, transcript, vault, provenance
room · Room · A place of work — a session, a bench, a gallery; rooms are places and the camera slides between them. · domain: language · kind: object · tags: session, place, workshop, bench, gallery

territory · Territory · A subject around its origin — soft-edged sectors radial about a centre; the cut and the route make a telling of it. · domain: language · kind: concept · tags: subject, sector, polygon, origin, map

operator · Operator · A universal sign — a relation whose meaning arrives free because everyone already holds it. · reads as: sign · domain: language · kind: concept · tags: sign, relation, universal, logic, edge
